title: Hot brush
abstract: A hair care appliance and methods for drying and/or styling hair are provided. The hair care appliance includes a handle having an inlet and a body coupled to the handle and having a plurality of outlets. The handle can include a fan assembly and a motor assembly and the applicant can include one or more heater assemblies. In one embodiment, the appliance includes at least one heater assembly extending along the body between the proximal and distal ends. In some aspects, the at least one heater assembly can longitudinally separate a first plurality of bristles from a second plurality of bristles. In other embodiments, a baffle for directing airflow is provided. In other embodiments, the appliance is configured to switch between hair drying and hair heating modes.
claims: 1. A hair care appliance, comprising: a body having proximal and distal ends with an inner lumen extending therethrough, the body including a first plurality of bristles positioned along a first surface extending between the proximal and distal ends, the first surface including a first plurality of outlets therein for allowing airflow therethrough from the inner lumen of the body, a second plurality of bristles positioned along a second surface extending between the proximal and distal ends, the second surface being positioned on an opposite side of the body from the first surface, and the second surface including a second plurality of outlets therein for allowing airflow therethrough from the inner lumen of the body, and at least one heater assembly extending along the body between the proximal and distal ends and including a plurality of heating plates spaced longitudinally from one another and excluding bristles therebetween, the at least one heater assembly longitudinally separating the first plurality of bristles from the second plurality of bristles, wherein the first and second surfaces lack a heater assembly.
